---
title: "domaci1"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-17"
---
```{r}
library(matlib)
```


```{r}
svd2=function(A) {
  A=as.matrix(A)
  m=nrow(A)
  n=ncol(A)
  AtA=t(A)%*%A
  eAtA=eigen(AtA)
  sv=sqrt(pmax(eAtA$values, 0))
  V=GramSchmidt(eAtA$vectors)
  AAt=A%*%t(A)
  eAAt=eigen(AAt)
  U=GramSchmidt(eAAt$vectors)
  k=min(m, n)
  for (i in 1:k) {
    if (sv[i] > 1e-10) {
      if (sum(U[,i]*(A%*%V)[,i])<0) {
        U[,i]=-U[,i]
      }
    }
  }
  sm=matrix(0, m, n)
  diag(sm)[1:k]=sv[1:k]
  
  return(list(U=U,sigma=sm,V=V,d=sv[1:k]))
}
```



```{r}
A=matrix(c(3,2,2,2,3,-2),nrow=2,byrow=TRUE)

svd2A=svd2(A)
svdA=svd(A)

print("svd2:")
print(svd2A$d)

print("svd:")
print(svdA$d)
```

```{r}
Ar=svd2A$U %*% svd2A$sigma %*% t(svd2A$V)
print("Originalna matrica:")
print(A)
print("Rekonstruisana matrica:")
print(round(Ar, 10))
```
